title: 2026-07-09｜Daily English

words.sentence: We should explain the technical constraint before changing the booking flow.
We need to get approval before releasing the new checkout page.
The design handoff should include states for loading, error, and empty results.
We need to handle edge cases when users select multiple travelers.
Caching can reduce latency when the user opens the itinerary page.
We should prepare a rollback plan before the production release.

words.meaning: 导航；页面路径；路线导航
words.sentence: The page navigation should remain clear after users complete payment.
Travelers usually book accommodation after confirming their flight itinerary.
The boarding pass should be easy to find in the trip details page.
Users may need a payment receipt for reimbursement after booking.

focus: 动态复习：继续强化 requirement / scope / estimate，用它们表达需求边界、工作量和排期。
技术表达：把 fallback / validation / render 复习成完整句子，例如 The fallback UI should render after validation fails.
今天新重点：constraint / edge case / latency / rollback，用来描述前端开发中的限制、边界场景、性能和发布风险。
旅行场景：accommodation / boarding / receipt，串成预订后的用户流程：book accommodation, check the boarding pass, download the receipt.
